posts.author: Hanging_Chad
posts.title: A HALAL BUTCHER IN ZURICH, SWITZERLAND HAS SOLD 3.1 TONS OF PORK LABELED AS VEAL TO MUSLIM CUSTOMERS, WHO HAVEN'T NOTICED ANY DIFFERENCE FOR 3 YEARS

link_metadata.description: 17K likes, 2,457 comments - thedailyinformer1080 on March 30, 2026: "3.1 tons. 3 years. 0 complaints. 1 routine inspection is what it took to expose it all.For three years, a butcher in Zurich, Switzerland sold 3.1 tons of pork to his Muslim customers while labeling it as halal veal. Not a single customer noticed. The fraud was only discovered during a routine food safety inspection when an inspector immediately recognized that the meat did not look like veal.The butcher was convicted of fraud and misrepresentation. He was sentenced to six months in prison and fined 18,000 Swiss francs. Prosecutors noted that he had profited significantly because veal sells at a much higher price than pork. His customers were cheated twice: they paid premium prices for cheap meat, and they unknowingly consumed a product their religion strictly forbids.The case raised serious questions about halal certification and food labeling transparency. posts.title:
Germany copies the decline of the Roman Empire, cuts silver content in the coins.

Germany cuts 46% of the silver and will increase ​the amount of copper. Both coins will weigh slightly less as a result.

twitter.content:
Germany copies the decline of the Roman Empire, cuts silver content in the coins.

Germany cuts 46% of the silver and will increase ​the amount of copper. Both coins will weigh slightly less as a result.

The weight will drop to 17 ​grams from 18 grams.
